package_title: I will build an autonomous data-pipeline agent for your business
description:
🔧 I will build an autonomous data-pipeline agent for your business

I deliver an agent that scrapes, cleans, enriches, and loads data into your DB on a schedule — hands-free using Crawl4AI + n8n + pgvector + Flowise — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• Done-for-you setup — no technical skills needed
• Free, open-source tools (you own it, no lock-in)
• Charge $1,500-$4,000 setup + $499-$1,500/mo retainer
• 7-day support after delivery

📦 Packages:
• Basic ($375, 5 days, 1 rev): Single agent, 1 workflow, Email support
• Standard ($1500, 10 days, 2 rev): Setup + test, Up to 3 agents, Loom walkthrough, 7-day support
• Premium ($3000, 14 days, 3 rev): Full system, Unlimited agents, Monthly retainer option, Priority support

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me your stack/goals (form on order)
2. I build & test the autonomous agent
3. I hand over + record a 5-min Loom walkthrough

⚡ Why me: I use the same tools that power a 100-skill autonomous company.
